sentences.text: Thank you for calling the Mercy housing home office located in Denver Colorado. Please listen carefully to the entire message as our menu options have changed. If you know your party's extension you may dial it at any time for property information press two for accounting dial six, two one seven for human resources and payroll dial three four two eight for Regional office phone number press five to leave a message in the general Mercy housing has several Regional offices. They are Mercy housing California, San Francisco, four one five three five five seven one zero zero Sacramento nine one six four one four four four zero zero Los Angeles two one three seven four three five eight two zero Mercy housing Lake front for Illinois Indiana and Wisconsin three one two four four seven four five zero zero Mercy housing Mountain plane for Colorado three zero three eight three zero three three zero zero mid, West for Iowa Kansas Missouri Nebraska, South Dakota and Utah nine one eight eight five three five three five eight four South West Arizona four eight zero five two five nine two seven eight Mercy housing North West for Idaho in Washington state. Two zero six eight three eight seven zero zero Mercy how.
